note: GeneralAdapter1 permit2TransferFrom plumbing leg (reached via Bundler3 multicall(Call[])). GA1 pulls `amount` of `token` from the bundle initiator via the user's Permit2 ALLOWANCE (not a signature-transfer) to `receiver`. The bundle's token-IN (over-pull bound = the Permit2 allowance). Modeled as token/erc20_transfer (token + amount + recipient, all in calldata); the Permit2-allowance mechanism's owner/nonce/deadline are NOT in this calldata, so the richer token/permit2_transfer_from variant would be mostly empty.
